hooks.command: git diff HEAD --quiet 2>/dev/null; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -eq 1 ]; then tmp=$(mktemp /tmp/ask-llm-XXXXXX); git diff HEAD -- ':!*.env*' ':!*.key' ':!*.pem' ':!*credentials*' ':!*secret*' ':!*.lock' | head -c 51200 > "$tmp"; gemini -p "Briefly review these session changes for any critical issues. Be concise — 3 bullets max. @$tmp" 2>/dev/null; rm -f "$tmp"; fi

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; staged=$(git diff --cached -- ':!*.env*' ':!*.key' ':!*.pem' ':!*credentials*' ':!*secret*' ':!*.lock' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$staged" ] && exit 0; tmp=$(mktemp /tmp/ask-llm-XXXXXX); echo "$staged" | head -c 51200 > "$tmp"; gemini -p "Review these staged changes about to be committed. Flag only critical issues that should block the commit. Be concise — 3 bullets max. @$tmp" 2>/dev/null; rm -f "$tmp"; exit 0
